      Value
      public static final String
      BUTTON_PRIMARY_STYLE
      "-fx-background-color: #2980b9; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 10 20; -fx-background-radius: 5;"
      public static final String
      BUTTON_SECONDARY_STYLE
      "-fx-background-color: #ecf0f1; -fx-text-fill: #2c3e50; -fx-padding: 8 16; -fx-background-radius: 5; -fx-border-color: #bdc3c7; -fx-border-radius: 5;"
      public static final String
      CARD_STYLE
      "-fx-background-color: white; -fx-background-radius: 8; -fx-effect: dropshadow(gaussian, rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 10, 0, 0, 2);"
      public static final String
      HEADER_STYLE
      "-fx-font-size: 18px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #2c3e50;"
      public static final String
      SUBHEADER_STYLE
      "-fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-text-fill: #7f8c8d;"
